title: The Duel Turns Deadly
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on the duel turns deadly, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Duel Turns Deadly. Nami fights Miss Doublefinger and learns how to use Usopp’s strange weapon under deadly pressure. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Dammit! If they keep running circles around me like this, there's no way I can finish them off in 3 minutes with a rumble ball!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hm? Where'd that other one go!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The one with the long nose! Where'd he go!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: That you guys aren't the only ones,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Where'd a scrawny brat like him get the strength to use something like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The number of ships I've sunk? Too many to count... The people call me,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: J-just who the hell are you!?

summary: This part develops the duel turns deadly and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
